steps.title: Read the welcoming image
steps.content: The underlined sentence personifies the trees as extending welcoming arms. Combined with the details that Kamala knows the woods well and is greeted as an old friend, the image presents the landscape as familiar and inviting.

steps.title: Reject unrelated functions
steps.content: A says Kamala feels uncomfortable near the river, but the underlined sentence is warm and occurs in the woods. B invents lost direction. D misreads old friend as human friendship. The function is to show that Kamala belongs in the landscape. The answer is C.
